name: Carrot-Raisin Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped nuts (pecans or cashews are good choices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the carrots carefully, being mindful not to injure yourself.
2. In a bowl, toss the grated carrots with the raisins, lemon juice, and sugar until combined.
3. Refrigerate the mixture until ready to serve.
4. Add the mayonnaise, nuts, and coconut (if using) to the salad. Toss gently to ensure all ingredients are well coated.
5. Serve on a plate or garnish each serving with a leaf of lettuce for an elegant presentation.
